opportunities.title: [Hiring] Part-time Community Managers for Leather Craft Subreddit - $15-$20/hr USD, Remote
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Part-time Community Managers for Leather Craft Subreddit - $15-$20/hr USD, Remote

Hi all, I'm looking for 2-3 people to help grow my subreddit focused on high-quality leather craftsmanship. Scope of Work: - Start organic discussions related to leather goods, handcrafting, tooling, leather care, etc. - Reply to comments and keep conversations going - Share your own experiences, projects, questions, or resources about leather craft - Help welcome new members and keep the community vibe friendly Compensation & Details: - Rate: $17 USD/hour based on experience + activity level - Time
